title: Automated Outreach: Why I (Kind of) Changed My Mind
summary: Why a previous stance on automated outreach needed revising.
show_notes_text:
Irfan addresses the question of automated outreach head-on: is it worth using automation tools for email outreach, or does personalization always win?

Key points covered:
- His original position against automated outreach and why he held it
- The scenarios where he now sees automation as viable
- How to balance scale with personalization
- Practical considerations for anyone running outreach campaigns
transcript_text: No transcript available for this episode.
